subcodes.first_line: O ye believers! Verily, it is for God to test His servants, and it behooveth not any servant to put to the test one who is faithful to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المومنون ان لله ان یمتحن عباده و لیس للعبد ان یمتحن عبداً مخلصاً لله
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
